name: Hurricane Jet-Vac
description: Hurricane Jet-Vac is the SuperCharger counterpart of Jet-Vac in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Jet Stream.
biography: Hurricane Jet-Vac is the SuperCharger counterpart of Jet-Vac in Skylanders: SuperChargers. A noble Sky Baron from Windham, he serves as a dedicated hero who uses his high-tech vacuum gun and fan blades to protect Skylands. His signature vehicle is the Jet Stream, and he remains a firm believer that a true hero flies with his heart, not his wings.
personality: Jet-Vac is a disciplined and dedicated hero with a formal, military-like demeanor, often using phrases like 'old chum' and 'old chap'. He values training and believes that true heroism comes from the heart rather than physical abilities. He remains humble about his skills and is always eager to defend the defenseless.

story.content: Hurricane Jet-Vac is the SuperCharger counterpart of Jet-Vac in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Jet Stream. He hails from Windham and represents the Air element as a member of the SuperChargers.

content: Hoho! You know me, Buzz. I'm always up for a spot of training. What's on the docket today, hmm?
Hmm... If you're looking for a tall tail, you should talk to Stink Bomb. That said, I would be delighted to demonstrate.
Pish-posh, Buzz. Anyone with sufficient training could do the same, and I find myself in your very capable, very filthy hands.
Not to worry, Buzz! A true hero flies with his heart, not his wings. Now, give me the mission details, so I can go give those baddies what-for.
Yes, well, it's just a title... but thank you, Buzz. Anything in defense of the defenseless, eh?

trivia: Hurricane Jet-Vac is the only re-imagined Skylander that doesn't have two names starting with the same letter as his SuperCharger counterpart name. In fact, he is the only one that doesn't have two names for his SuperCharger counterpart.
Early concepts of Hurricane Jet-Vac depict him with a number of scrapped accessories, such as a pirate hat, sailor's hat, goggles, and a feathery shawl reminiscent of Stormblade's.

trailers.name: Skylanders SuperChargers - Hurricane Jet-Vac's Soul Gem Preview (Hawk and Awe)

gameplay: Hurricane Jet-Vac uses fan blades and a vacuum to control the battlefield. He can shoot bouncing blades, suck in enemies to use as projectiles, and dash forward with powerful kicks. His upgrades allow him to create explosive hurricanes and perform advanced aerial maneuvers like the Double Flip.

basic.name: Shooting the Breeze
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot a fan blade that can bounce off multiple enemies.

basic.name: Jet Turbine Vacuum
basic.content: Press and hold Attack 2 to suck an enemy into your vacuum. Press Attack 2 again to shoot the enemy out.

basic_upgrades.name: Somer-Assault
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to dash forwards. Enemies in the way will get kicked and damaged.

basic_upgrades.name: Hurricane Hurrah
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge up a hurricane, release to unleash it and damage any enemies in its path.

basic_upgrades.name: Make Them Sore
basic_upgrades.content: Somer-Assault attacks do more damage. Kicking and screaming!

soulgems.name: Having a Blast!
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 2 to vacuum in enemies, release to shoot enemies as projectiles which will bounce and hit other enemies. When an enemy has low health, they will be launched with extreme force!

abilities.name: Category Pain
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 and release it to create a hurricane. Press Attack 1 repeatedly to shoot blades into the hurricane.

abilities.name: Hurricano
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 and release to create a Hurricane. Hurricanes now explode once it is over and damages enemies inside and around the hurricane.

abilities.name: Splitting Air
abilities.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot a bouncing blade while holding an enemy.

abilities.name: Turbulent Turbine
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 to dash forward. Enemies behind you when the dash is started take more damage.

abilities.name: Talon Take Off
abilities.content: Enemies hit at the end of a Somer-Assault are knocked back further and take more damage.

abilities.name: Double Flip
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 twice to give Somer-Assault another boost to travel further. Press Attack 3 after performing the Double Flip to perform another on the same enemy.
